accounts.name: buyer
docs: User ka wallet — buyer. SOL iske wallet se deduct hoga.

accounts.name: treasury
docs: Treasury — price, fee, mint info stored hai yaha.

accounts.name: mint
docs: Token Mint — kis token ke tokens buy karne hain.

accounts.name: treasury_token_account
docs: Treasury ka token account — yaha se tokens user ko transfer honge.

accounts.name: buyer_token_account
docs: User ka token account — yaha pe bought tokens aayenge.
`init_if_needed` = agar user ka pehla purchase hai toh account create hoga.

accounts.name: vault
docs: SOL Vault — user ka SOL yaha jaayega.

accounts.name: system_program
docs: System Program — SOL transfer ke liye.

accounts.name: token_program
docs: Token Program — token transfer ke liye.

accounts.name: associated_token_program
docs: Associated Token Program — ATA create karne ke liye (init_if_needed).

accounts.name: voter
docs: Voter ka wallet.

accounts.name: treasury
docs: Treasury — vote_cost ke liye.

accounts.name: mint
docs: Token Mint.

accounts.name: proposal
docs: Proposal — jis pe vote karna hai.

accounts.name: vote_record
docs: Vote Record — duplicate voting rokne ke liye.
Seeds: ["vote_record", proposal.key(), voter.key()]
Agar yeh account pehle se exist kare → matlab user already vote kar chuka hai.

accounts.name: voter_token_account
docs: Voter ka token account — yaha se tokens deduct honge.

accounts.name: voting_escrow
docs: Voting Escrow — yaha pe vote tokens lock honge.

accounts.name: system_program
docs: System Program.

accounts.name: token_program
docs: Token Program.

accounts.name: creator
docs: Proposal creator ka wallet.

accounts.name: treasury
docs: Treasury — proposal_cost, vote_cost, mint info ke liye.

accounts.name: mint
docs: Token Mint.

accounts.name: proposal_counter
docs: Proposal Counter — next proposal ID generate karne ke liye.
`init_if_needed` = pehla proposal ho toh counter bhi create hoga.

accounts.name: proposal
docs: Proposal Account — naya proposal data yaha store hoga.
Seeds: ["proposal", treasury, proposal_id]
proposal_id = counter.count (current count, jo abhi increment hoga)

accounts.name: proposal_escrow
docs: Proposal Escrow Token Account — proposal_cost tokens yaha lock honge.
Seeds: ["proposal_escrow", proposal.key()]
Yeh ek PDA-owned token account hai.

accounts.name: voting_escrow
docs: Voting Escrow Token Account — vote tokens yaha lock honge.
Seeds: ["voting_escrow", proposal.key()]

accounts.name: creator_token_account
docs: Creator ka token account — yaha se tokens deduct honge.

accounts.name: system_program
docs: System Program.

accounts.name: token_program
docs: Token Program.

accounts.name: associated_token_program
docs: Associated Token Program.

accounts.name: admin
docs: Admin ka wallet — yeh sign karega aur rent pay karega.
`mut` kyunki SOL deduct hoga (account creation rent ke liye).

accounts.name: mint
docs: Naya token mint account — PDA se derive hota hai.
Seeds: ["mint", admin.key()] — har admin ka ek unique mint hoga.
`init` = naya account create karega
`payer = admin` = admin rent pay karega
`mint::decimals = 6` = 6 decimal places (1 token = 1,000,000 smallest units)
`mint::authority = treasury` = treasury hi tokens mint kar sakti hai

accounts.name: treasury
docs: Treasury state account — platform ki sari configuration yaha store hoti hai.
Pehli baar create hota hai (init_if_needed) — agar already exist kare toh
reuse hota hai.
Seeds: ["treasury", admin.key()] — har admin ki ek unique treasury.
space = 8 + Treasury::INIT_SPACE
8 bytes = discriminator (Anchor har account me add karta hai)
INIT_SPACE = #[derive(InitSpace)] macro se auto-calculate hota hai

accounts.name: system_program
docs: System Program — naye accounts create karne ke liye zaroori hai.
Solana me har account create karne ke liye system program call hota hai.

accounts.name: token_program
docs: SPL Token Program — mint operations ke liye zaroori hai.
Yeh Solana ka official token program hai jo sare SPL token
operations handle karta hai.

accounts.name: rent
docs: Rent sysvar — account ko rent exempt banana ke liye check hota hai.
Solana me har account ko minimum balance rakhna padta hai
taaki woh delete na ho.

accounts.name: creator
docs: Creator ka wallet — sirf creator finalize kar sakta hai.

accounts.name: treasury
docs: Treasury.

accounts.name: mint
docs: Token Mint.

accounts.name: proposal
docs: Proposal — finalize hone wala proposal.

accounts.name: proposal_escrow
docs: Proposal Escrow — isme locked tokens treasury ko ja rahe hain.

accounts.name: voting_escrow
docs: Voting Escrow — isme locked tokens creator ko ja rahe hain.

accounts.name: treasury_token_account
docs: Treasury ka token account — proposal escrow ke tokens yaha jayenge.

accounts.name: creator_token_account
docs: Creator ka token account — voting escrow ke tokens yaha jayenge.

accounts.name: system_program
docs: System Program.

accounts.name: token_program
docs: Token Program.

accounts.name: associated_token_program
docs: Associated Token Program.

accounts.name: admin
docs: Admin ka wallet — signer + payer.

accounts.name: treasury
docs: Treasury state account — pehle se exist karna chahiye (CreateToken me bana tha).
`has_one = admin` = check karta hai ki treasury.admin == admin.key()
Matlab sirf original admin hi treasury initialize kar sakta hai.

accounts.name: mint
docs: Token Mint — pehle se exist karna chahiye (CreateToken me bana tha).
Yeh verify karta hai ki sahi mint use ho raha hai.

accounts.name: treasury_token_account
docs: Treasury ka Token Account — yaha pe sare tokens store honge.
`init` = naya create hoga
`associated_token::mint = mint` = is mint ke tokens store karega
`associated_token::authority = treasury` = treasury own karega
Associated Token Account (ATA) Solana ka standard hai — har wallet
ke liye har token ka ek deterministic address hota hai.

accounts.name: vault
docs: SOL Vault — ek PDA jo SOL store karta hai.
Jab users tokens buy karte hain → SOL yaha aata hai.
Jab users tokens redeem karte hain → SOL yaha se jaata hai.
`seeds = ["vault", treasury.key()]` — treasury se linked hai.
`init` = pehli baar create ho raha hai.
`space = 0` = koi data store nahi karta, sirf SOL hold karta hai.
NOTE: "space = 0" means sirf 8 bytes discriminator ke liye nahi hai,
SystemAccount hai toh koi data nahi — sirf lamports hold karta hai.

accounts.name: system_program
docs: System Program — account creation ke liye.

accounts.name: token_program
docs: Token Program — token account operations ke liye.

accounts.name: associated_token_program
docs: Associated Token Program — ATA create karne ke liye.

accounts.name: admin
docs: Admin ka wallet — signer.

accounts.name: treasury
docs: Treasury — mint authority confirm karne ke liye + has_one check.

accounts.name: mint
docs: Token Mint — jis token ke tokens mint karne hain.
`mut` kyunki mint ke baad supply badhegi.

accounts.name: treasury_token_account
docs: Treasury ka token account — mint ke tokens yaha jayenge.
treasry_token_account → treasury ki authority ke andar.

accounts.name: token_program
docs: Token Program — mint_to CPI ke liye.

accounts.name: redeemer
docs: User ka wallet — redeemer.

accounts.name: treasury
docs: Treasury.

accounts.name: mint
docs: Token Mint.

accounts.name: redeemer_token_account
docs: User ka token account — yaha se tokens deduct honge.

accounts.name: treasury_token_account
docs: Treasury ka token account — tokens yaha deposit honge.

accounts.name: vault
docs: SOL Vault — yaha se SOL user ko jaayega.

accounts.name: system_program
docs: System Program — SOL transfer ke liye.

accounts.name: token_program
docs: Token Program — token transfer ke liye.

accounts.name: admin
docs: Admin ka wallet — signer + payer (metadata account ka rent pay karega).

accounts.name: treasury
docs: Treasury — mint authority ke roop me sign karega (PDA signer).
Treasury is mint ki authority hai, toh metadata set karne ke liye
treasury ka signature chahiye.

accounts.name: mint
docs: Token Mint — jis token ka metadata set karna hai.

accounts.name: metadata_account
docs: Metadata Account — Metaplex ka standard metadata account.
Yeh UncheckedAccount hai kyunki Metaplex program isse validate karega.
Seeds by Metaplex: ["metadata", token_metadata_program_id, mint_key]
We cannot use a typed account here because it's created by an external program.

accounts.name: system_program
docs: System Program — CPI (Cross Program Invocation) ke liye.

accounts.name: token_program
docs: Token Program

accounts.name: token_metadata_program
docs: Metaplex Token Metadata Program — metadata create karne ke liye.

accounts.name: rent
docs: Rent sysvar

accounts.name: admin
docs: Admin ka wallet — signer.

accounts.name: treasury
docs: Treasury — settings yahi store hoti hain.
`has_one = admin` = confirm karta hai ki sahi admin hai.

accounts.name: admin
docs: Admin ka wallet — jaha SOL jaayega.

accounts.name: treasury
docs: Treasury — admin verify karne ke liye.

accounts.name: vault
docs: SOL Vault — yaha se SOL nikala jaayega.

accounts.name: system_program
docs: System Program.

errors.name: TreasuryAlreadyInitialized
errors.msg: Treasury has already been initialized

errors.name: TreasuryNotInitialized
errors.msg: Treasury has not been initialized yet

errors.name: InvalidTokenPrice
errors.msg: Token price must be greater than zero

errors.name: InvalidMintAmount
errors.msg: Mint amount must be greater than zero

errors.name: InvalidBuyAmount
errors.msg: Buy amount must be greater than zero

errors.name: InvalidRedeemAmount
errors.msg: Redeem amount must be greater than zero

errors.name: InsufficientSolBalance
errors.msg: Insufficient SOL balance to complete the transaction

errors.name: InsufficientVaultBalance
errors.msg: Insufficient SOL in the vault for redemption

errors.name: InsufficientTokenBalance
errors.msg: Insufficient token balance

errors.name: TooFewOptions
errors.msg: Proposal must have at least 2 options

errors.name: TooManyOptions
errors.msg: Proposal can have at most 10 options

errors.name: EmptyQuestion
errors.msg: Proposal question cannot be empty

errors.name: QuestionTooLong
errors.msg: Proposal question is too long (max 200 chars)

errors.name: EmptyOption
errors.msg: Option text cannot be empty

errors.name: OptionTooLong
errors.msg: Option text is too long (max 50 chars)

errors.name: DeadlineMustBeInFuture
errors.msg: Deadline must be in the future

errors.name: NotEnoughTokensForProposal
errors.msg: Not enough tokens to create a proposal

errors.name: InvalidOptionIndex
errors.msg: Invalid option index for voting

errors.name: ProposalExpired
errors.msg: Proposal voting period has ended

errors.name: AlreadyVoted
errors.msg: You have already voted on this proposal

errors.name: NotEnoughTokensForVote
errors.msg: Not enough tokens to vote

errors.name: ProposalAlreadyFinalized
errors.msg: Proposal has already been finalized

errors.name: UnauthorizedFinalizer
errors.msg: Only the proposal creator can finalize

errors.name: ProposalNotExpired
errors.msg: Proposal deadline has not passed yet

errors.name: InvalidFeePercentage
errors.msg: Fee percentage must be between 0 and 10000 (basis points)

errors.name: InvalidProposalCost
errors.msg: Proposal cost must be greater than zero

errors.name: InvalidVoteCost
errors.msg: Vote cost must be greater than zero

errors.name: EmptyTokenName
errors.msg: Token name cannot be empty

errors.name: EmptyTokenSymbol
errors.msg: Token symbol cannot be empty

errors.name: EmptyTokenUri
errors.msg: Token URI cannot be empty

errors.name: ArithmeticOverflow
errors.msg: Arithmetic overflow occurred

errors.name: InvalidWithdrawAmount
errors.msg: Withdraw amount must be greater than zero

types.name: FeesWithdrawn
docs: Jab admin platform ke fees (SOL) vault se apne wallet me withdraw karta hai.
Example: Admin ne 1.5 SOL withdraw kiye
→ FeesWithdrawn { admin: "ADMIN...", amount: 1_500_000_000 }

fields.name: admin
docs: Admin ka wallet address (jisne withdraw kiya)

fields.name: amount
docs: Kitne lamports withdraw hue

types.name: MetadataSet
docs: Jab admin token ka metadata (name, symbol, uri) set karta hai.
Example: Admin ne token ka name "PollToken", symbol "POLL" set kiya
→ MetadataSet { mint: "ABC...", name: "PollToken", symbol: "POLL" }

fields.name: mint
docs: Token mint ka address

fields.name: name
docs: Token ka name (e.g., "PollToken")

fields.name: symbol
docs: Token ka symbol (e.g., "POLL")

types.name: PlatformSettingsUpdated
docs: Jab admin platform settings update karta hai (price, costs, fee).
Example: Price=0.1 SOL, proposal=10 tokens, vote=1 token, fee=10%
→ PlatformSettingsUpdated { token_price: 100_000_000, proposal_cost: 10_000_000,
vote_cost: 1_000_000, fee_basis_points: 1000 }

fields.name: token_price
docs: 1 token ka price lamports me (1 SOL = 1_000_000_000 lamports)

fields.name: proposal_cost
docs: Proposal create karne ke liye kitne tokens chahiye (smallest unit me)

fields.name: vote_cost
docs: Vote karne ke liye kitne tokens chahiye (smallest unit me)

fields.name: fee_basis_points
docs: Platform fee basis points me (1000 = 10%, 500 = 5%, 10000 = 100%)

fields.name: creator
docs: Proposal creator ka wallet address.
Sirf creator hi proposal ko finalize kar sakta hai.
Finalize ke baad voting escrow ke tokens creator ko milte hain.

fields.name: question
docs: Proposal ka question — yeh woh sawaal hai jis pe log vote karte hain.
Example: "Best blockchain?" ya "Solana ya Ethereum?"
Max 200 characters allowed hai.
#[max_len(200)] → InitSpace ko batata hai ki String max 200 bytes ho sakti hai.
Anchor automatically 4 bytes length prefix + 200 bytes content = 204 bytes allocate karega.

fields.name: options
docs: Voting options ki list — yeh woh choices hain jinme se user ek choose karta hai.
Example: ["Solana", "Ethereum", "Polygon"]
Min 2, Max 10 options allowed.
#[max_len(10, 50)] → Vec me max 10 items, har item max 50 bytes.
Anchor calculate karega: 4 (vec length) + 10 * (4 + 50) = 544 bytes

fields.name: vote_counts
docs: Har option pe kitne votes aaye — index options ke index se match karta hai.
Example: agar options = ["Solana", "Ethereum"] aur vote_counts = [5, 3]
toh Solana ko 5 votes mile aur Ethereum ko 3.
#[max_len(10)] → max 10 u64 values (har option ke liye ek).
Anchor: 4 (vec length) + 10 * 8 = 84 bytes

fields.name: total_votes
docs: Total number of votes casted on this proposal.
Yeh voting escrow me locked tokens ka indicator bhi hai.

fields.name: deadline
docs: Proposal ki deadline — Unix timestamp (seconds me).
Iske baad vote nahi kar sakte, sirf finalize kar sakte hain.
Example: current_time + 86400 (24 hours baad)

fields.name: is_finalized
docs: Kya proposal finalize ho chuka hai ya nahi.
Finalize ke baad na vote ho sakta hai na dubara finalize.

fields.name: proposal_escrow
docs: Proposal Escrow Token Account ka address.
Jab proposal create hota hai, proposal_cost tokens yaha lock hote hain.
Finalize ke baad yeh tokens treasury me wapas jaate hain.

fields.name: voting_escrow
docs: Voting Escrow Token Account ka address.
Jab koi user vote karta hai, vote_cost tokens yaha lock hote hain.
Finalize ke baad yeh tokens creator ko milte hain.

fields.name: proposal_escrow_bump
docs: Proposal escrow PDA ka bump seed.

fields.name: voting_escrow_bump
docs: Voting escrow PDA ka bump seed.

fields.name: proposal_id
docs: Unique proposal ID — har proposal ka alag ID hota hai.
Yeh PDA derive karne ke liye use hota hai.

fields.name: count
docs: Ab tak kitne proposals bane hain. Naye proposal ka ID = count + 1.
Example: agar count = 5, toh next proposal ka ID = 6.

types.name: ProposalCreated
docs: Jab user naya proposal create karta hai — tokens escrow me jaate hain.
Example: U1 ne "Best blockchain?" proposal banaya, 10 tokens escrow me gaye
→ ProposalCreated { proposal: "PROP...", creator: "U1...",
question: "Best blockchain?", deadline: 1234567890,
escrow_amount: 10_000_000 }

fields.name: proposal
docs: Proposal account ka address

fields.name: creator
docs: Proposal creator ka wallet address

fields.name: question
docs: Proposal ka question

fields.name: deadline
docs: Deadline — Unix timestamp (seconds me)

fields.name: escrow_amount
docs: Kitne tokens escrow me gaye

types.name: ProposalFinalized
docs: Jab proposal finalize hota hai — escrow release hota hai.
Proposal escrow → treasury, Voting escrow → creator
Example: Proposal finalized. 10 tokens treasury me gaye, 2 tokens creator ko mile.
→ ProposalFinalized { proposal: "PROP...", creator: "U1...",
proposal_escrow_returned: 10_000_000,
voting_escrow_to_creator: 2_000_000,
total_votes: 2 }

fields.name: proposal
docs: Finalized proposal ka address

fields.name: creator
docs: Proposal creator — jisko voting escrow ke tokens milenge

fields.name: proposal_escrow_returned
docs: Kitne tokens proposal escrow se treasury me gaye

fields.name: voting_escrow_to_creator
docs: Kitne tokens voting escrow se creator ko mile

fields.name: total_votes
docs: Total kitne votes aaye the proposal pe

types.name: TokenCreated
docs: Jab admin naya SPL token mint create karta hai tab yeh event emit hota hai.
Frontend isse use karke token mint address display kar sakta hai.
Example: Admin ne 6 decimals wala token create kiya
→ TokenCreated { mint: "ABC...", decimals: 6 }

fields.name: mint
docs: Naye token mint ka public key address

fields.name: decimals
docs: Token ke decimals (e.g., 6 means 1 token = 1_000_000 smallest units)

types.name: TokensMinted
docs: Jab admin treasury account me tokens mint karta hai tab yeh emit hota hai.
Example: Admin ne 1000 tokens mint kiye
→ TokensMinted { mint: "ABC...", amount: 1_000_000_000, destination: "TREASURY..." }

fields.name: mint
docs: Kis token mint ke tokens mint hue

fields.name: amount
docs: Kitne tokens mint hue (smallest unit me, decimals ke saath)

fields.name: destination
docs: Kis account me tokens gaye (usually treasury token account)

types.name: TokensPurchased
docs: Jab user tokens buy karta hai SOL de kar.
Example: U1 ne 10 tokens kharide, 1 SOL cost + 0.1 SOL fee
→ TokensPurchased { buyer: "U1...", amount: 10_000_000,

fields.name: buyer
docs: Buyer ka wallet address

fields.name: amount
docs: Kitne tokens buy kiye (smallest unit me)

fields.name: sol_cost
docs: SOL cost (excluding fee) lamports me

fields.name: fee
docs: Platform fee lamports me

types.name: TokensRedeemed
docs: Jab user tokens redeem karta hai SOL wapas lene ke liye.
Example: U1 ne 10 tokens redeem kiye, 1 SOL mila minus 0.1 SOL fee
→ TokensRedeemed { redeemer: "U1...", amount: 10_000_000,

fields.name: redeemer
docs: Redeemer ka wallet address

fields.name: amount
docs: Kitne tokens redeem kiye (smallest unit me)

fields.name: sol_received
docs: Kitne SOL mila (fee minus karke) lamports me

fields.name: fee
docs: Platform fee lamports me

fields.name: admin
docs: Admin ka wallet address — sirf yeh admin operations perform kar sakta hai.
Jaise token create, mint, settings update, treasury initialize, etc.

fields.name: mint
docs: SPL Token Mint ka address — yeh woh token hai jo puri platform pe use hota hai.
Admin isse create karta hai (e.g., POLL token).

fields.name: treasury_token_account
docs: Treasury ka token account — yaha pe tokens store hote hain.
Jab admin mint karta hai → tokens yaha aate hain.
Jab user buy karta hai → tokens yaha se jaate hain.
Jab user redeem karta hai → tokens yaha wapas aate hain.

fields.name: vault_bump
docs: SOL Vault PDA ka bump seed — PDA derive karne ke liye use hota hai.
PDA = Program Derived Address, ek special address jo program own karta hai.
Bump stored karte hain taaki har baar recalculate na karna pade.

fields.name: token_price
docs: 1 token ka price lamports me (1 SOL = 1,000,000,000 lamports).
Example: agar price = 100,000,000 toh 1 token = 0.1 SOL
Yeh admin set karta hai platform settings me.

fields.name: proposal_cost
docs: Proposal create karne ke liye kitne tokens chahiye (smallest unit me).
Example: agar proposal_cost = 10,000,000 aur decimals = 6
toh 10 tokens chahiye proposal banane ke liye.
Yeh tokens proposal escrow me lock ho jaate hain.

fields.name: vote_cost
docs: Vote karne ke liye kitne tokens chahiye (smallest unit me).
Example: agar vote_cost = 1,000,000 aur decimals = 6
toh 1 token chahiye vote karne ke liye.
Yeh tokens voting escrow me lock ho jaate hain.

fields.name: fee_basis_points
docs: Platform fee basis points me.
1 basis point = 0.01%, so:
Yeh fee token buy aur redeem dono pe lagti hai.

fields.name: is_initialized
docs: Kya treasury initialize hui hai ya nahi.
Pehli baar initialize ke baad yeh true ho jaata hai.
Dubara initialize karne se rokne ke liye use hota hai.

types.name: TreasuryInitialized
docs: Jab admin treasury ko initialize karta hai — treasury token account
aur SOL vault dono banate hain.
Example: Admin ne treasury initialize ki
→ TreasuryInitialized { treasury: "TRES...", vault: "VAULT...", token_account: "TA..." }

fields.name: treasury
docs: Treasury state account ka address

fields.name: vault
docs: SOL vault PDA ka address — yaha SOL store hota hai

fields.name: token_account
docs: Treasury ka token account — yaha tokens store hote hain

types.name: VoteCast
docs: Jab user kisi proposal pe vote karta hai — tokens voting escrow me jaate hain.
Example: U2 ne "Solana" pe vote kiya, 1 token escrow me gaya
→ VoteCast { proposal: "PROP...", voter: "U2...",
option_index: 0, token_cost: 1_000_000 }

fields.name: proposal
docs: Kis proposal pe vote hua

fields.name: voter
docs: Voter ka wallet address

fields.name: option_index
docs: Kis option pe vote diya (0-indexed)

fields.name: token_cost
docs: Vote ke liye kitne tokens liye gaye (smallest unit me)

fields.name: voter
docs: Voter ka wallet address.

fields.name: proposal
docs: Kis proposal pe vote kiya.

fields.name: option_index
docs: Kis option pe vote diya (0-indexed).
Example: agar options = ["Solana", "Ethereum"] aur option_index = 0
toh voter ne Solana pe vote kiya.
